user.title: Connect to UniFi Protect
user.description: Enter the address and a local Protect account (created on the console itself, not a Ubiquiti cloud login).

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the NVR. Check the host and port.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See the logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This UniFi Protect NVR is already configured.
